question_types.description: 喜好题 - 是否喜欢/最喜欢什么
question_types.template: Do you like/enjoy...? / What's your favorite...?

answer_framework.extended_structure: Topic + Reason + Personal Experience（增加交流感）
tips: 直接表明喜好立场
给出2个具象化的理由
可以加入个人经历增加交流感
用 passion for / fascinated by 等替代简单的 like

examples: Do you like reading?
Do you like to take scenery pictures?
Do you like taking pictures of different views?
Do you like watching team sports games?
Do you like to visit a museum?
Do you like buying shoes?
Do you like to lend things to others?
Do you like getting up early in the morning?
Do you want to live in a tall building?
Do you have any hobbies?
Do you have a hobby that you've had since childhood?
Do you walk a lot?
Do you keep plants at home?
Do you always bring a lot of keys with you?
What's your favorite animal?
What's your favorite food?
What are the most beautiful sights you have seen while travelling?
Do you bring food or snacks with you when going out?
Do you always take your mobile phone with you when going out?
Do you often tell your friends when they do something well?
Do you look out the window at the scenery when travelling by bus or car?

question_types.description: 对比题 - 偏好选择/二选一
question_types.template: Do you prefer A or B? / Which do you prefer, A or B?

answer_framework.structure: 双边讨论 - 捧一踩一（不同角度）
answer_framework.extended_structure: 分情况讨论（按物品/人群/时间等维度）
tips: 可以选择一边明确立场
也可以分情况讨论 (It depends on...)
使用转折连接词: however, while, whereas, in contrast
用不同角度对比，避免重复
结构示例: If I want to... markets are..., while if I purchase... malls are...

examples: Do you prefer living in an old building or a modern house?
Do you prefer the mountains or the sea?
Do you prefer views in urban areas or rural areas?
Do you prefer views in your own country or in other countries?
Do you prefer to read on paper or on a screen?
Do you prefer scanned reading or detailed reading?
Do you prefer typing or handwriting?
Do you type on a desktop or laptop keyboard every day?
Do you prefer to have more or fewer rules at school?
Which do you prefer, fashionable shoes or comfortable shoes?
Where do you prefer to keep your pet, indoors or outdoors?

question_types.description: 种类题 - 什么种类/类型
question_types.template: What kind(s) of... do you like/are popular...?

answer_framework.structure_single: Kind: 大类→小类 + 特点/原因
answer_framework.structure_plural: Kinds: 三类 + 其中典型一类 + 原因x2
tips: 单数kind: 先说大类再举小类的例子
复数kinds: 列举三类，再详细说其中一类
使用话题词提升词汇分数
递进连接词: especially, such as, particularly, in specific, to name a few

examples: What kind of cars do you like?
What kind of house or apartment do you want to have in the future?
What kind of food did you like when you were young?
What kind of things do you like to share with others?
What kinds of flowers have special meanings?
What kinds of things are not suitable for sharing?
What kinds of websites are popular in your country?

question_types.description: 观点题 - 你认为…重要/好吗

answer_framework.extended_structure_1: Topic + Reason + 反证（负面影响/假设句）
answer_framework.extended_structure_2: 分情况讨论: 普遍性 + 特殊性
tips: 直接表明立场 (Agree/Disagree)
给出2个支持理由
可用反证法: 假设反面情况的负面影响
假设句型: If..., Assuming..., Imagining..., Given that...
注意陷阱词: all, never, impossible, only — 避免绝对化
可以分情况: In most situations... While in some special cases...

examples: Do you think punctuality is important?
Do you think museums are important?
Do you think we should preserve old buildings in cities?
Do you think parents should often praise and encourage their children?
Do you think students would benefit more from more rules?
Do you think you are good at choosing gifts?
Do you think it's a good idea to leave your keys with a neighbor?
Why do people like to walk in parks?

question_types.description: 经历题 - 你曾经…过吗/上次是什么时候
question_types.template: Have you ever...? / When was the last time you...? / Did you...?

answer_framework.structure_yes: Yes + 时间/地点/人物/事件 + 感受(which...)
answer_framework.structure_no: No + 期待/拒绝 + 原因
tips: 使用过去时态（一般过去时为主）
Yes回答: 提供时地人事四要素
结尾用 which 引导感受句
感受词: light-hearted / heavy-hearted / memorable / fascinating
No回答: 表达期待或解释为什么没有
时间标记: Back in my childhood / Last year / When I was in college

examples: Have you ever bought shoes online?
Have you ever talked with someone you don't know in public places?
Have you ever been part of a sports team?
Have you ever had a pet before?
Have you seen an unforgettable and beautiful view or scenery?
Have you ever sent handmade gifts to others?
Have you ever received a great gift?
Have you ever lost your keys?
Have you borrowed books from others?
Have you ever borrowed money from others?
Have you ever worked with old people?
When was the last time you visited a museum?
When did you learn how to type on a keyboard?
What did you do in the morning when you were little?
Did you often go outside to have a walk when you were a child?
Did you have any hobbies when you were a child?
Do you have an experience that your teacher thought you did a good job?

question_types.description: 频率题 - 多久一次/经常吗
question_types.template: How often do you...? / Do you often...?

answer_framework.structure: 频率 + 原因 + 具体描述
tips: 使用地道频率表达替代简单的 always/sometimes/never
频率由高到低: all the time → constantly → daily → every other day → on a weekly basis → often → every now and then → occasionally → once in a while → rarely → hardly ever → once in a blue moon
搭配具体场景和原因

examples: Do you walk a lot?
Do you often go to public places with your friends?
How often he/she draws/paints?
Do you often forget the keys and lock yourself out?

question_types.description: 变化题 - 过去与现在的对比
question_types.template: Has... changed since...? / Did you... when you were young?

answer_framework.structure: 过去情况 + 现在情况 + 原因/感受
tips: 使用时态对比: 过去时 vs 现在时
时间标记: back in my childhood / when I was young / nowadays
表达变化: used to... but now... / has changed from... to...
如果没变化可以说: From my childhood till now, I've always...

examples: Has your favorite food changed since you were a child?
What kind of food did you like when you were young?
Did you have any hobbies when you were a child?
What did you do in the morning when you were little?
